_comment: THE DOUBT ENGINE config (canon, committed). Shape taxonomy v0 = marker heuristics over the mandatory 'maine-socha-X-phir-Y' doubt structure (FORGE_SPEC §3 makes doubts machine-parseable by construction). Shapes are MACHINE-SIDE: they seed probe design and are never shown pre-Pehle-Guess. Lexicon anchors are verbatim extraction only — Claude never invents his metaphors; breaking-points are the captain's to declare.
